name: Ruitai Materials Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Ruitai Materials Technology Co., Ltd. researches, produces, sells, and services refractories in the People's Republic of China. The company provides fused cast, basic, alumina-silica, silica, and unshaped refractories, as well as polybasic alloyed casting balls and bars, and low chromium alloyed castings bars and capsules balls. It serves glass, cement, steel and iron, nonferrous, electrical, petrochemical, and other industries. The company also exports its products. Ruitai Materials Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
